m	Z	
Support for embedded TeX expressions in Matplotlib.
Requirements:
* LaTeX.
* \*Agg backends: dvipng>=1.6.
* PS backend: PSfrag, dvips, and Ghostscript>=9.0.
* PDF and SVG backends: if LuaTeX is present, it will be used to speed up some
  post-processing steps, but note that it is not used to parse the TeX string
  itself (only LaTeX is supported).
To enable TeX rendering of all text in your Matplotlib figure, set
:rc:`text.usetex` to True.
TeX and dvipng/dvips processing results are cached
in ~/.matplotlib/tex.cache for reuse between sessions.
`TexManager.get_rgba` can also be used to directly obtain raster output as RGBA
NumPy arrays.
Path)
TemporaryDirectory)
_api
cbook
dviread
optionc
    Output LaTeX code that loads a package (possibly with an option) if it
    hasn't been loaded yet.
    LaTeX cannot load twice a package with different options, so this helper
    can be used to protect against users loading arbitrary packages/options in
    their custom preamble.
    N
z]\makeatletter\@ifpackageloaded{%(package)s}{}{\usepackage%(option)s{%(package)s}}\makeatother
packager
;/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/matplotlib/texmanager.py
_usepackage_if_not_loaded'

TexManagerz
    Convert strings to dvi files using TeX, caching the results to a directory.
    Repeated calls to this constructor always return the same instance.
    z	tex.cache)

)#z;Return the complete TeX source for processing a TeX string.g
\documentclass{article}z=% Pass-through \mathdefault, which is used in non-usetex modez>% to use the default text font but was historically suppressedz
% in usetex mode.z \newcommand{\mathdefault}[1]{#1}z
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}z.\DeclareUnicodeCharacter{2212}{\ensuremath{-}}z3% geometry is loaded before the custom preamble as z<% convert_psfrags relies on a custom preamble to change the z
% geometry.z1\usepackage[papersize=72in, margin=1in]{geometry}z?% Use `underscore` package to take care of underscores in text.z?% The [strings] option allows to use underscores in file names.Z
underscoreZ
stringsr
z;% Custom packages (e.g. newtxtext) may already have loaded z"% textcomp with different options.Z
textcompz
\pagestyle{empty}z
\begin{document}z>% The empty hbox ensures that a page is printed even for emptyz=% inputs, except when using psfrag which gets confused by it.z;% matplotlibbaselinemarker is used by dviread to detect thez
% last line's baseline.z
\fontsize{z
}%z!\ifdefined\psfrag\else\hbox{}\fi%
\end{document})

rgbar
get_greyE
TexManager.get_grey
        Return latex's rendering of the tex string as an rgba array.
        Examples
        --------
        >>> texmanager = TexManager()
        >>> s = r"\TeX\ is $\displaystyle\sum_n\frac{-e^{i\pi}}{2^n}$!"
        >>> Z = texmanager.get_rgba(s, fontsize=12, dpi=80, rgb=(1, 0, 0))
